title: Many Additional Ores
description:
This mod adds new ores, tools, armor and many more !!! 
The changes for coming  updates will be in the desrciption of the mod.
body:
## This project was a test project and is now archived, we are going to work on better mods, with more features and better designs. That's why it is now ARCHIVED and will not get any updates soon... We might un-archive this in the future and change it entirely

---------------------------

This mod adds many new ores, tools, armors, drills (that mine 3x3), blocks !!! 

This is a mod inspired from real ores, but you may find ores that doesn't exist in real life, too. We will try to update it frequently, so it can have bug fixes new content and transform to a larger mod with many features.

# Ore Types 

### Current Ore Types :

1. Tin
2. Titanium
3. Lead
4. Cobalt
5. Ruby
6. Tungsten

_More coming soon..._

![Ingots (from the ores)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/753776277e9ac1c15a4f6f82a833133a5dbc30f0.png)

<details>
<summary>Current Workbenches</summary>

# Current Workbenches 

1. Tin Enhanced Blast Furnace
   
2. _Tin Workbench (Coming soon...)_



More coming soon...


</details>


<details>
<summary>NOT Coming Soon...</summary>

- In Version 0.0.1b :
1. Bug fixes
2. New ores
3. new items
4. villager traders
5. New entities
6. New structures

-----------------

- In Version 0.0.2 :
1. New entities
2. New ores
3. New workbenches/crafting tables
4. Many more...


</details>
